# David Caldicott — Presence Node
# https://presence.davidcaldicott.online
# Version: 1 (Phase 0 — static)

## Who

David Caldicott — Coach, Builder, Systems thinker. UK-based.
Mission: I help people and systems become whole.

## What this node is

A dual-view site: human door (presence.davidcaldicott.online) and AI door (this file + endpoints below).
The corpus is David's curated public work across four altitudes (L3–L0).
Phase 0 is fully static. Phase 1 adds Donna, an AI host agent.

## Endpoints

- /llms.txt         — this file (agent orientation)
- /node.json        — identity, offers, intents, links, availability (static handshake)
- /api/corpus       — JSON index of all public content items (slug, title, level, kind, tags, hc)

## Corpus levels

- L3 (50k ft)       — mission, vision, who this person is in ten seconds
- L2 (operational)  — active offers, who David wants to meet
- L1 (library)      — essays, KIMBA / SAHARA / HumanCode frameworks, media
- L0 (ground)       — current writing, now-page, changelog

## Frameworks (David's IP)

- KIMBA — Kinesthetic Internal Memory Balancing Action (therapeutic / parts-work)
- SAHARA — Self-Aware, Honest, Adaptable, Responsible, Authenticity (structured authenticity process)
- HumanCode — compact notation for encoding documents / systems into AI-parseable shorthand

## Contact / booking

https://meet.davidcaldicott.online

## Agent notes

- All content in /api/corpus is public tier only
- No pricing improvisation — link to cta URLs for offers
- Phase 1+: Donna handles live agent-to-agent reception at /api/host (not yet active)
